---
title: "About"
description: "The story behind MyProject."
toc: true
---

## Mission

Built with care, shared freely.

MyProject started as an internal tool and grew into a community-maintained library used around the world. Our goal is simple: make good software easier to build — without imposing unnecessary complexity or vendor lock-in.

::: {.stat-row}
::: {}
::: {.stat-num}12k:::
::: {.stat-label}GitHub Stars:::
:::
::: {}
::: {.stat-num}340:::
::: {.stat-label}Contributors:::
:::
::: {}
::: {.stat-num}4M:::
::: {.stat-label}Downloads / mo:::
:::
::: {}
::: {.stat-num}MIT:::
::: {.stat-label}License:::
:::
:::

---

## Core Team

**Alice Chen** — Core architecture & performance.

**Mateo García** — API design & developer experience.

**Priya Nair** — Testing, CI, and release process.

We're a small, fully remote team distributed across three continents. Contributions from the wider community are what make MyProject what it is.

---

## License

MyProject is released under the **MIT License**. You are free to use, modify, and distribute it in any project — personal or commercial — with no restrictions beyond attribution.

```
MIT License

Copyright (c) 2025 MyProject Contributors

Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy
of this software...
```

[View full license on GitHub →](https://github.com/your-username/your-repo/blob/main/LICENSE)

---

## Contact & Community

- 💬 [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/your-username/your-repo/discussions) — questions, ideas, and show-and-tells.
- 🐛 [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/your-username/your-repo/issues) — bug reports and feature requests.
- 📬 [hello@myproject.dev](mailto:hello@myproject.dev) — for everything else.
